params.tokens: Array of HTS token EVM addresses to associate with this contract.

associateTokens(address[]).notice: Associates this contract with HTS tokens so it can hold them transiently during zaps. On Hedera, any contract that receives HTS tokens MUST be associated with them first. This must be called once per vault before that vault can be zapped into.

zapOutHBAR(address,address,uint256,uint2.notice: Performs a single-asset withdrawal from a Rheo Vault natively to HBAR
